# Maurya Soni

> Maurya Soni is a frontend developer based in Ahmedabad, India. He builds clean, responsive, and high-performance web interfaces with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript.

## Summary

Maurya Soni is a frontend developer currently working at Krishaweb. He focuses on modern web application interfaces, performance-conscious frontend development, and smooth collaboration across the product lifecycle. He also has working knowledge of backend development with Node.js, MongoDB, and Sequelize.

## Location

Ahmedabad, India

## Current Role

- Frontend Developer at Krishaweb
- Start date: May 2024
- Focus: React, Next.js, responsive UI development, production-ready frontend implementation

## Core Skills

- HTML
- CSS
- SCSS
- Tailwind CSS
- JavaScript
- React
- Next.js
- Node.js
- MongoDB
- Sequelize

## Education

- B.Tech in Information Technology, Charusat University, 2020-2024
- Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC), Nirman High School, Vastrapur, 2018-2020
- Secondary School Certificate (SSC), St. Kabir School, Drive-In, 2006-2018

## Selected Projects

### Freshly

A recipe discovery application built with Next.js. It features a clean responsive interface, recipe browsing and search, saved items, and a performance-oriented setup using static site generation.

Repository: https://github.com/maurya22010/recipe-app

### Leave App

A MERN stack leave management system with role-based workflows. Employees can submit leave requests and managers can review, approve, or reject them through a structured dashboard experience.

Repository: https://github.com/maurya22010/leave-mgmt-frontend

### FoodMart

A MERN stack food delivery platform with product listings, category filtering, cart management, and checkout flow for an end-to-end ordering experience.

Repository: https://github.com/maurya22010/foodmart-frontend
